criteria.reason: Paid action preflight exists for map_reviews_refresh and registry-backed future actions.
Preflight checks estimate, balance, consent mode, limits, disabled policy, and unknown action keys.
Preflight is read-only and reports no execution, charge, or external calls.
Authenticated Operator API endpoint added after business access verification.
Operator web controls render preflight input and result.
Focused tests cover ready and blocked states.

commands_run: python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_operator_paid_preflight.py tests/test_operator_consent_policy.py tests/test_operator_paid_actions.py tests/test_operator_attention.py tests/test_telegram_dashboard_copy.py
python3 -m py_compile src/services/operator_paid_preflight.py src/api/operator_api.py src/services/operator_consent_policy.py src/services/operator_paid_actions.py src/services/operator_attention.py
